summary: A small rectangular monument or shrine structure with a stepped pyramid roof. The building features a brick wall base with decorative elements, a white concrete foundation and trim, and a dark wood or dark block stepped roof. The structure sits on a dirt platform surrounded by grass.

shape.overall_form: rectangular box with stepped pyramid roof

materials.name: wood
materials.role: roof blocks (dark wood or dark planks)

elements: decorative horizontal stripe pattern on wall
rebuild_hints: Create rectangular foundation of white concrete blocks approximately 8×10 blocks
Build brick wall layer above foundation, approximately 3-4 blocks tall
Add decorative horizontal stripe pattern using lighter colored blocks (possibly stone brick or concrete) on the brick wall
Construct stepped pyramid roof using dark wood or dark blocks, with 3-4 stepped layers decreasing in size toward center
Ensure bilateral symmetry on all sides
Surround structure with dirt platform, then grass border
The roof steps appear to have small concrete or light-colored accent blocks on the sides of each step
uncertainties: Exact block count and precise dimensions uncertain from perspective views
Specific dark material for roof (could be dark oak wood, spruce wood, or dark concrete)
Exact pattern and spacing of decorative stripe on brick wall
Whether the structure has any interior space or is solid
Exact height of foundation relative to wall
